body.title: CLOSED: igor not receiving web messages
body.result: wired web_server.incoming into _drain_network; NetworkMessage restored in web/server.py; 614 tests pass
body.description:
Igor is not reacting to messages received from the web. No output in console, no response visible. Likely a disconnect between the web socket listener and Igor's message dispatch, or a missing route in the receive_cc_direction handler.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/tools/receive_cc_direction.py, wild_igor/igor/network/web_server.py (or equivalent), message routing
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** IN — diagnose why web messages aren't reaching Igor's main loop, fix the routing. OUT — implementing new web features or auth.
**Test plan:** Manual: send a test message from the web interface, verify Igor receives it and logs it (once console logging is added).
